Original: Hey, mum's back! I told you she'd be back today!
Tradução: Ei, mamãe voltou! Eu te disse que ela voltaria hoje!

Original: Maybe you can stop being so sad all the time, mum. Dad's back!

Original: You lied, mum! Dad didn't run off with a troll! See!?

Original: How come you don't go down on quests like mummy?

Original: I cleaned behind my ears like you told me to!

Original: Is dad going to go away again, mum?

Original: Yay! Mum can read me a story tonight, now she's back!

Original: You going to show your dad what a nice boy you are?
